message:
fix(ft-nn): AlphaDropout composes through autograd primitives [bd-734h]

AlphaDropout used to extract input values, apply the alpha-dropout
transform in plain f64, and rebuild a requires_grad=false leaf —
silently severing autograd through every AlphaDropout layer.

AlphaDropout is paired with SELU activations to maintain mean and
variance through dropout (Klambauer et al. 2017, "Self-Normalizing
Neural Networks"). Models using SELU + AlphaDropout couldn't
actually train.

Compose through autograd-aware primitives:
   keep_branch = mask * input             (mul through input)
   drop_branch = (1 - mask) * sat         (constant)
   pre_affine  = keep_branch + drop_branch
   scaled      = a * pre_affine
   y           = scaled + a * p * sat

Mask is a non-grad random leaf (sampled per forward), the rest of
the chain is autograd-aware so gradients flow to input.

Closes frankentorch-734h. ft-nn lib tests: 517 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
